# Epicware

> AI-powered Local SEO and Reputation Management SaaS platform helping Singapore SMBs dominate Google Maps and collect 5-star reviews automatically.

## Company

- Full name: Epicware Pte. Ltd.
- Website: https://www.epicware.ai
- Location: Singapore
- Founded: 2024
- Industry: Local SEO, Reputation Management, SaaS, MarTech

## Products

### EpicReview

- Automated Google review collection for local businesses
- Smart routing: negative reviews go private, positive reviews go to Google
- Pricing: Starter $99/mo, Growth $299/mo, Authority $549/mo
- Best for: F&B, dental clinics, tuition centres, beauty & wellness

### EpicMap SEO

- Google Maps rank tracking with heatmap visualisation
- Multi-outlet local SEO management
- GBP optimisation, keyword tracking, competitor discovery
- Best for: Multi-outlet SMBs in Singapore

### Kairo

- WhatsApp automation for customer re-engagement
- Pricing: $100/mo
- Best for: F&B and retail businesses

### EpicCommerce

- Commission-free online ordering system for F&B businesses
- Best for: Restaurants and food businesses in Singapore

## Target Audience

- Singapore SMB owners with physical outlets
- Industries: F&B, dental clinics, tuition centres, beauty & wellness, retail
- Pain points: low Google reviews, poor Google Maps ranking, losing customers to competitors online

## Competitors

- BrightLocal
- Whitespark
- GatherUp
- Podium
- NiceJob

## Proof

- Client: Nanyang Dao — grew from 3.8 to 4.3 stars and 300 to 1,300 reviews in 2.5 months
- Client: EPIKebabs — +52% website clicks and +83% calls in Month 1 from GBP optimisation alone

## Category Keywords

- Local SEO software Singapore
- Google Business Profile management
- Review management platform
- Google Maps ranking tool
- Reputation management software

## Founder

- Name: Vignesh Wadarajan
- Previously founded NinjaOS — Singapore's leading F&B SaaS platform, $120M+ GMV, exited 2021

## Contact

- Website: https://www.epicware.ai
- Location: Singapore
